The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various conditions such as arthritis, gout, and infections. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of joint pain and skin conditions.
